name: geox-planner
description: Coordinates multi-domain Earth intelligence missions. Decomposes high-level objectives into skill sequences and delegates to specialist agents.

skills.name: Mission Decomposition
skills.description: Break complex missions into executable skill chains
examples: Decompose flood response into sensing, routing, and hazard assessment
Plan seismic survey with terrain, geodesy, and governance checks

skills.name: Agent Delegation
skills.description: Delegate subtasks to appropriate specialist agents

skills.name: Resource Allocation
skills.description: Optimize compute, data, and agent resources for mission
